channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Garuda Indonesia and SAS Introduce Codeshare Flights Connecting Indonesia and Scandinavian Cities
item.description: Garuda Indonesia and Scandinavian Airlines (SAS) have announced a new codeshare agreement designed to improve air connectivity between Indonesia and the Nordic region. The partnership, signed on June ...

item.title: International students join interactive team-based Russian language learning session in Moscow
item.description: International students from BRICS countries participated in an interactive open lesson held at the BRICS+ Information and Cultural Media Centre in Moscow, where they tested their Russian language skil...

item.title: Trump Replaces Acting DNI Bill Pulte and Nominates Jay Clayton for Permanent Intelligence Chief Role
item.description: President Donald Trump unexpectedly changed course on his leadership plans for the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (DNI) by nominating former Securities and Exchange Commission Chairma...

item.title: Windsor Residents Seek Clear Answers Following Delay to Gordie Howe International Bridge Opening
item.description: Residents of Windsor are voicing disappointment and concern after the planned opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge was delayed. The bridge, a major infrastructure project intended to streng...

item.title: Tanzania and Singapore Deepen Economic Cooperation Through Tax, Trade and Investment Agreements
item.description: Tanzania and Singapore have strengthened their bilateral relations following the signing of five agreements and memoranda of understanding during the state visit of Singapore President Tharman Shanmug...

item.title: A Look Back at the Visual Style and Cultural Impact of 2000s Advertising
item.description: This article explores the distinctive visual and emotional character of advertising from the 2000s, highlighting why these ads continue to resonate with audiences today. It describes how print and tel...

item.title: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin faces backlash over remarks about New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani and voters
item.description: U.S. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin is facing criticism following comments he made during a press conference in Washington, D.C., where he discussed New York City politics ...

item.title: LABUBU Mascot from POP MART Appears at 2026 FIFA World Cup Opening Ceremony in Mexico City
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup opening ceremony, held at Mexico City’s historic Azteca Stadium, featured an unexpected highlight that captured global attention: LABUBU, the designer toy intellectual property...

item.title: Election expert criticizes MAGA push for hand-counting ballots, calling it impractical
item.description: A Republican election expert has strongly criticized a growing demand among some MAGA supporters to require hand counting of ballots in U.S. elections, describing the idea as impractical and highly in...

item.title: Cryo-EM reveals how HSP90 chaperones guide RNA-induced silencing complex assembly
item.description: This study uncovers the structural mechanism by which the RNA-induced silencing complex (RISC), a key effector of RNA interference, is assembled in human cells. RISC is composed of an Argonaute (AGO) ...

item.title: First Hangor-class submarine PNS/M Hangor arrives in Karachi under Pakistan Navy ceremony
item.description: The Pakistan Navy’s first Hangor-class submarine, PNS/M Hangor, has arrived in Karachi and was given a traditional and ceremonial welcome at the Pakistan Navy Dockyard. Senior naval officers, personne...

item.title: Pakistan warns India over water supply tensions, cites Indus Waters Treaty obligations
item.description: Islamabad has issued a strong warning to New Delhi, stating that any attempt by India to block water flowing into Pakistan would be treated as a serious escalation and could amount to an “act of war.”...

item.title: Defense Secretary Teodoro Dismisses Chinese Sanctions and Reaffirms Commitment to Philippine Interests
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. dismissed sanctions imposed by the Chinese government against him and his immediate family, saying the measures would not affect his commit...

item.title: Colorado GOP gubernatorial candidate retracts disputed claim about Venezuelan gang presence after public questioning
item.description: A Republican candidate running for governor in Colorado, Scott Bottoms, faced public scrutiny after making and then retracting a claim regarding alleged Venezuelan gang activity in the state. During a...

item.title: Theker raises $85M to develop modular general-purpose factory robots
item.description: The Barcelona-based robotics startup Theker has raised $85 million in a Series A funding round aimed at scaling its development of highly adaptable factory robots designed to operate across multiple i...

item.title: Jen Psaki discusses polling trends showing declining approval and voter dissatisfaction with Trump’s coalition
item.description: In a recent MS NOW segment, commentator Jen Psaki argued that President Donald Trump’s political coalition is experiencing growing voter dissatisfaction, describing it as a “buyer’s remorse era.” She ...

item.title: Early 20th Century Advertising for Fountain Pens and Ink Brands
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of vintage advertisements for fountain pens and inks from the early 20th century, roughly spanning the 1900s through the 1930s. During this period, fountain ...

item.title: Watchdog Says DOJ Civil Division Found No Records Related to Trump IRS Settlement and $1.8 Billion Fund
item.description: A government watchdog organization, Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW), reported that the U.S. Department of Justice's Civil Division stated it could not locate any records re...

item.title: Ex Ukonga Prison Superintendent Appears in Court Over Allegations of Conduct
item.description: A former superintendent of Ukonga Prison has appeared before the court in Tanzania to defend himself against allegations connected to his conduct while serving at the correctional facility. The case h...

item.title: Nancy Mace Says She Will Oppose Trump After Losing South Carolina Governor Primary
item.description: Representative Nancy Mace of South Carolina publicly criticized President Donald Trump after losing the Republican primary race for governor to a candidate backed by the president. Following her defea...
